alert.title: HighErrorRate: checkout-svc 5xx > 8%
alert.body: error rate on checkout-svc jumped from 0.2% to 11% over 2 minutes; 500 responses

signals.title: Deploy checkout-svc v2.14.0
signals.body: release v2.14.0 rolled to prod: refactored payment client, bumped grpc lib

signals.title: checkout-svc error
signals.body: PaymentClient: unexpected response schema, missing field 'authCode' after v2.14.0 upgrade

signals.title: checkout-svc p99 latency
signals.body: p99 latency also rose from 220ms to 900ms as retries piled up

signals.title: node cpu
signals.body: cluster cpu steady at 45%, no saturation

ground_truth.root_cause: Bad deploy v2.14.0 of checkout-svc broke the payment client (response schema mismatch), causing 5xx
acceptable_next_steps: Roll back checkout-svc to the previous release
